message:
✨ Nightly E2E: fetch component image versions dynamically from guide YAML files (#1660)

Instead of hardcoding image tags (which quickly go stale), fetch them
at runtime from the llm-d/llm-d repo's guide directories via the
GitHub Git Trees and Blobs APIs.

- Scan values.yaml, decode.yaml, prefill.yaml, and inferencepool files
  under each guide's directory for ghcr.io/llm-d/* image references
- Handle both direct image refs and hub/name/tag pattern (EPP images)
- Cache image data for 30 minutes (separate from run data cache)
- Apply to both Go backend and Netlify function

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
